title: DAIdentity - Identity card Medieval
description: DAIdentity is a lightweight and immersive roleplay mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1, allowing each player to generate their own unique identity card — ideal for RP servers and immersive worlds.
body:
**DaIdentity – Immersive Identity Card for Roleplay
**
**DaIdentity** is a lightweight roleplay-focused mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.20.1, bringing immersive, customizable identity cards to your world. Perfect for medieval servers, RPG adventures, or roleplay communities.

## ✨ New Features

**✅ Enhanced Custom Identity Creation
**Players can now generate a fully detailed identity card with a single command:

/dai <firstname> <lastname> <age> <birthdate> <job> <skill> <race>

**🪪 NBT-Powered Identity Card
**
A renamed paper item is given to the player.

Stores all identity data securely in NBT tags:

First Name

Last Name

Age

Birthdate

Job

Skill (new!)

Race (new!)

**🖼️ Interactive Medieval GUI
**
Right-click the card to open a parchment-style interface.

Displays all the player’s details in a clean, immersive layout.

**🔐 Secure System
**
Each player can only run /dai once to create their card.
**
📦 Mod Information

🧱 Minecraft Version: 1.20.1

⚙️ Modloader: Fabric

📁 Client & Server Compatible**
